metadata.title: Doughnut-Hole Test Improvement Plan and Bug Fix

cold-start-context.summary:
Deep code review (5 parallel agents, bottom-to-top) of the SAM3 gradient checkpointing / factorial experiment code paths discovered 18 bugs (5 critical, 7 high, 6 medium) and a "doughnut hole" in test coverage where the middle of the config → model → GC activation chain had ZERO test coverage.
This plan fixes all bugs and fills all test gaps in priority order: Phase 1 (P0): 8 critical bug fixes + 6 tests — blocks cloud launches Phase 2 (P0): 6 tests for the doughnut-hole chain — prevents regression Phase 3 (P1): 7 high-priority fixes + 6 tests — correctness under conditions Phase 4 (P2): 5 medium fixes + cleanup Phase 5: Code review + /simplify + final verification
cold-start-context.execution-protocol: For EACH task: 1. Set task status to IN_PROGRESS (update this XML file) 2. Read ALL impl_files and test files listed in tdd_spec 3. Execute via /self-learning-iterative-coder: RED: Write failing test(s) first GREEN: Implement the fix / new code VERIFY: make test-staging FIX: If failures, fix them 4. Set task status to COMPLETED (update this XML file) 5. After each PHASE completes: run /simplify on changed files 6. Commit with message: "fix: [phase] [description] (#doughnut-hole)" 7. Run make test-staging — MUST be 0 fail, 0 skip before next phase
cold-start-context.git-protocol: 1. git checkout -b fix/doughnut-hole-bugs-and-test-coverage test/run-debug-9th-pass-report 2. Commit after each phase (5 commits total) 3. Final: PR → main with all phases

phase.name: P0 Critical Bug Fixes
phase.description: Fix the 5 critical bugs that cause incorrect training behavior, silent OOM, or wrong scientific results. Each fix includes the corresponding regression test.

task.name: Fix encoder non-LoRA params not frozen in Sam3TopoLoraAdapter
task.description:
BUG: _apply_lora_to_encoder wraps FFN layers in LoRA but NEVER freezes the remaining encoder params (attention Q/K/V, LayerNorm, patch embeddings, position embeddings). The backbone was created with freeze=False, and _freeze_encoder() was never called. Result: the entire 648M encoder is trainable, defeating the purpose of LoRA (parameter-efficient fine-tuning) and explaining excessive VRAM.
FIX: After applying LoRA, explicitly freeze all encoder parameters EXCEPT the LoRA A/B matrices. The pattern: iterate encoder.named_parameters(), freeze all that don't contain "lora_" in their name.
EVIDENCE: sam3_topolora.py lines 257-275. The docstring at line 6 says "Frozen SAM3 ViT-32L encoder" but the code never freezes non-LoRA params.

task.name: Fix gradient_checkpointing silently False on Hydra-zen config_dict path
task.description:
BUG: When training_flow() receives config_dict (the EXPERIMENT env var / Hydra composition path), gradient_checkpointing is NOT extracted from config_dict at lines 1363-1379. The function parameter defaults to False (line 1317). Then merged.update(config) at line 1455 OVERWRITES any gradient_checkpointing from config_dict with False.
The same bug affects: gradient_accumulation_steps, with_aux_calib, max_train_volumes, max_val_volumes, zero_shot, eval_dataset.
FIX: Extract ALL factorial-relevant keys from config_dict at lines 1363-1379: gradient_checkpointing = config_dict.get("gradient_checkpointing", gradient_checkpointing) gradient_accumulation_steps = config_dict.get("gradient_accumulation_steps", gradient_accumulation_steps) with_aux_calib = config_dict.get("with_aux_calib", with_aux_calib) ... (all missing keys)
EVIDENCE: train_flow.py lines 1363-1379 (extraction), 1453-1456 (merge).

task.name: Fix SWAG always using fold 0 data
task.description:
BUG: The config dict built at lines 1432-1450 never includes "fold_id". When _run_swag_post_training reads config.get("fold_id", 0) at line 1216, it always gets 0. If the job was launched with --fold 2, SWAG rebuilds training data from fold 0 instead of fold 2.
FIX: Add "fold_id": fold_id to the config dict at line 1432-1450. Also pass the current fold's split data to _run_swag_post_training instead of having it re-derive from config.
EVIDENCE: train_flow.py lines 1432-1450 (config dict), 1216 (SWAG read).

task.name: Fix get_volume_embeddings wrong dimension order
task.description:
BUG: Sam3Backbone.get_volume_embeddings() at line 405 unpacks as b, c, d, h, w = volume.shape — depth at dim 2. But MONAI outputs (B, C, H, W, D) — depth last. The CLAUDE.md for this directory explicitly warns about this. sam3_feature_cache.py calls this method, meaning cached features have incorrect spatial dimensions.
FIX: Change to b, c, h, w, d = volume.shape and iterate with for z_idx in range(d): slice_2d = volume[:, :, :, :, z_idx]
EVIDENCE: sam3_backbone.py line 405, sam3_feature_cache.py line 66. Cross-ref: src/minivess/adapters/CLAUDE.md "MONAI Dimension Order" section.

task.name: Fix SkyPilot recover_on_exit_codes never emitted
task.description:
BUG: train_factorial.yaml declares recover_on_exit_codes: [33, 34] with comments saying "33 = DVC network error, 34 = HF download timeout." But the setup script uses exit 1 everywhere. The EAGER_NEXT_REGION strategy is dead for setup failures.
FIX: Add explicit exit codes to the setup script: - DVC pull failure: exit 33 - HF download timeout: exit 34 And add a test that validates the exit codes match the recovery config.
EVIDENCE: train_factorial.yaml line 52 (config), lines 153, 204 (exit 1).

task.name: Fix check_gradient_flow cleanup — leaked gradients waste ~2.5 GB
task.description:
BUG: After forward+backward, check_gradient_flow() never calls model.zero_grad(set_to_none=True). Residual .grad tensors on all 648M SAM3 parameters consume ~2.5 GB that are never freed. The model is also left in .train() mode without restoring original mode.
FIX: Add cleanup at the end of check_gradient_flow(): model.zero_grad(set_to_none=True) # Restore original mode would be ideal but not critical since # the next check (check_loss_sanity) calls model.eval()
Also fix: the except RuntimeError swallows OOM without logging. Change to log the exception before returning the CheckResult.
EVIDENCE: pre_training_checks.py lines 90-130.

task.name: Fix config fingerprint mismatch between training_subflow and train_one_fold_task
task.description:
BUG: In training_subflow (line 841), compute_config_fingerprint is called with with_aux_calib but WITHOUT patch_size. In train_one_fold_task (line 603), the same function is called with patch_size but WITHOUT with_aux_calib. These produce different fingerprints for the same configuration, breaking auto-resume cross-referencing.
FIX: Both call sites should pass identical keyword arguments. Extract the fingerprint inputs to a helper function that both call sites use.
EVIDENCE: train_flow.py lines 603 vs 841.

task.name: Add missing get_eval_roi_size() to Sam3TopoLoraAdapter and Sam3HybridAdapter
task.description:
BUG: Sam3VanillaAdapter overrides get_eval_roi_size() to return (512, 512, 3), which is critical because the ViT encoder costs the same regardless of spatial size. Sam3TopoLoraAdapter and Sam3HybridAdapter do NOT override it, falling back to the base class default (128, 128, 16). This creates ~3300 validation windows instead of ~27, making validation take ~6 hours instead of ~4 minutes.
FIX: Add get_eval_roi_size() override to both adapters returning (512, 512, 3).
EVIDENCE: sam3_topolora.py (missing override), sam3_hybrid.py (missing override), sam3_vanilla.py (has override — use as reference).

phase.name: Doughnut-Hole Chain Tests
phase.description:
The test coverage has excellent endpoints but ZERO coverage in the middle: [TESTED] factorial config (GC: true) → [UNTESTED] run_factorial.sh parsing → [UNTESTED] train_flow.py injection → [UNTESTED] _skip_grad_flow wiring → [TESTED] pre_training_checks.py → [TESTED (AST only)] Sam3Backbone GC
This phase fills the gap with 6 targeted tests.

task.name: Runtime test: Sam3Backbone gradient_checkpointing_enable() called
task.description:
GAP: All 5 existing GC tests are AST/string-search. NONE actually instantiate Sam3Backbone with gradient_checkpointing=True and verify the HuggingFace gradient_checkpointing_enable() method was called.
APPROACH: Mock _load_sam3_encoder to return a mock encoder with a gradient_checkpointing_enable method. Instantiate Sam3Backbone with gradient_checkpointing=True, freeze=False. Assert the method was called with gradient_checkpointing_kwargs={"use_reentrant": False}.
REFERENCE: The mock pattern exists in test_sam3_nan_guard.py lines 50-73.

task.name: Test: train_flow.py injects gradient_checkpointing into architecture_params
task.description:
GAP: ZERO tests for the injection logic at train_flow.py lines 452-456: _gc_config = config.get("gradient_checkpointing", False) if _gc_config and "gradient_checkpointing" not in arch_params: arch_params["gradient_checkpointing"] = True
APPROACH: Unit test the injection logic directly. Extract the relevant code block into a testable helper function if needed, or test via the config dict that train_one_fold_task builds.

task.name: Test: _skip_grad_flow wiring when gradient_checkpointing is enabled
task.description:
GAP: ZERO tests for train_flow.py lines 631-641: _skip_grad_flow = bool( config.get("gradient_checkpointing", False) or arch_params.get("gradient_checkpointing", False) ) ... skip_gradient_flow=_skip_grad_flow ...
This was one of the two root causes of the 9th pass failure.
APPROACH: Test the boolean logic directly and verify it's passed to run_pre_training_checks(). May need to extract to a helper function for testability.

task.name: Test: SkyPilot YAML has GRADIENT_CHECKPOINTING env var
task.description:
GAP: The test_has_required_env_vars test checks 13 env vars but does NOT include GRADIENT_CHECKPOINTING. The YAML defines it at line 103.
APPROACH: Add GRADIENT_CHECKPOINTING to the required env vars list. Also add BATCH_SIZE and GRAD_ACCUM_STEPS which are also missing from the envs: section (they're passed via --env but should have defaults).

task.name: Test: run_factorial.sh dry-run shows grad_ckpt=true for SAM3
task.description:
GAP: The @slow dry-run tests check for bs= and accum= but NOT grad_ckpt=.
APPROACH: Parse dry-run output and verify: - SAM3 TopoLoRA conditions show grad_ckpt=true - SAM3 Hybrid conditions show grad_ckpt=true - DynUNet conditions show grad_ckpt=false - MambaVesselNet conditions show grad_ckpt=false

task.name: Test: checks_to_dict serialization including skipped gradient_flow
task.description:
GAP: checks_to_dict() has ZERO test coverage. It serializes CheckResult lists for MLflow artifact logging.
APPROACH: Test with various result sets including: - Normal results (all passed) - Mixed results (some passed, some failed) - Skipped gradient_flow (the skip_gradient_flow=True path)

phase.name: P1 High-Priority Fixes
phase.description: Fix bugs that cause correctness issues under specific but realistic conditions. Each fix includes a regression test.

task.name: Consolidate 3 redundant no_grad forward passes in pre_training_checks
task.description:
BUG: check_output_shape, check_loss_sanity, and check_nan_inf each run a separate torch.no_grad() forward pass. For SAM3 with slice-by-slice processing, each pass iterates all Z slices. Three passes = 3x wall-clock time.
FIX: Run a single no_grad forward pass and reuse the output for all three checks. Extract a _run_inference_once() helper that returns the output tensor. Pass it to check_output_shape, check_loss_sanity, check_nan_inf as an arg.
CONSTRAINT: check_gradient_flow must remain a separate pass (needs gradients). The skip_gradient_flow logic is unaffected.
EVIDENCE: pre_training_checks.py lines 43-73, 133-175, 178-206.

task.name: Fix signal handling — kill sky jobs launch children on Ctrl+C
task.description:
BUG: The cleanup() function kills background shell subshells (jobs -p) but NOT the sky jobs launch child processes within them. Ctrl+C leaks submissions.
FIX: Add signal propagation to the subshells: ( trap 'kill 0' EXIT; ... sky jobs launch ... ) Or use process group kill in cleanup: kill -- -$$ 2>/dev/null || true
EVIDENCE: run_factorial.sh lines 41-51 (cleanup), 404-434 (subshells).

task.name: Fix zero-shot baselines ignoring --resume flag
task.description:
BUG: The resume logic (lines 349-367) only checks training conditions. The zero-shot Python block (lines 482-553) does not check whether a zero-shot condition is already in the queue. Resume re-submits duplicates.
FIX: Pass EXISTING_ACTIVE_JOBS to the Python block and check before launching each zero-shot condition.
EVIDENCE: run_factorial.sh lines 470-556.

task.name: Fix sam3_hybrid GatedFeatureFusion.forward() never called
task.description:
BUG: Sam3HybridAdapter.forward() at lines 241-261 manually reimplements the fusion logic instead of calling self.fusion(logits, sam_features). The class's forward() method is dead code. Also: sam_features.detach() is redundant because the features already came from a torch.no_grad() context.
FIX: Refactor to call self.fusion(logits, sam_features) directly. Remove the redundant detach() and the inline reimplementation.
EVIDENCE: sam3_hybrid.py lines 241-261 (inline), line 78 (fusion forward).

task.name: Fix post_training_run_id empty string instead of None
task.description:
BUG: The ternary chain at lines 1486-1492 can produce "" (empty string) instead of None when all pt_run_ids entries are None with len > 1. "" is truthy, misleading downstream checks.
FIX: Add explicit None check: result = ",".join(...) or None
EVIDENCE: train_flow.py lines 1486-1492.

task.name: Extract duplicate patch_size resolution logic
task.description:
DUP: The _is_sam3 -> (64,64,3) / _is_vesselfm -> (64,64,32) / else -> (64,64,16) logic appears at train_flow.py lines 424-434 AND lines 1229-1238.
FIX: Extract to a shared function resolve_patch_size(model_family: str) -> tuple[int,int,int] and call from both locations.
EVIDENCE: train_flow.py lines 424-434 and 1229-1238.

task.name: Fix lockfile not cleaned on early exit paths
task.description:
BUG: If preflight fails (line 147), run_factorial.sh exits via exit 1 but the lockfile written at line 136 is never removed. The cleanup trap only handles INT/TERM (line 52), not EXIT or regular exit paths.
FIX: Add EXIT to the trap, or add explicit rm -f "${LOCKFILE}" before each early exit. The simplest fix: trap cleanup EXIT INT TERM (remove lockfile on any exit).
EVIDENCE: run_factorial.sh lines 52 (trap), 136 (lockfile write), 147 (early exit).

phase.name: P2 Medium Fixes and Cleanup
phase.description: Fix medium-priority issues, remove dead code, and improve documentation.

task.name: Fix torch.cuda.is_bf16_supported() crash on CPU-only machines
task.description:
BUG: Sam3Backbone.__init__ calls torch.cuda.is_bf16_supported() at line 113-114 without guarding for the no-CUDA case. This crashes on CPU-only machines.
FIX: Guard with torch.cuda.is_available() first: if torch.cuda.is_available() and torch.cuda.is_bf16_supported(): ... else: self._encoder_dtype = torch.float16
EVIDENCE: sam3_backbone.py lines 113-114.

task.name: Add cache invalidation metadata to sam3_feature_cache
task.description:
BUG: Sam3FeatureCache saves .pt files without model version metadata. If the model changes (different weights, different preprocessing), cached features become stale. No mechanism to detect this.
FIX: Save a metadata JSON alongside each .pt cache file containing: - Model checkpoint hash (or weight file path) - Input preprocessing config hash - Cache creation timestamp On load, verify metadata matches current model config.
EVIDENCE: sam3_feature_cache.py line 60.

task.name: Remove dead code across all reviewed files
task.description:
Dead code identified across the codebase: 1. pre_training_checks.py docstring: claims 6 checks, only 4 exist — update docstring 2. sam3_topolora.py line 119: LORA_FFN_KEYWORDS "fc1", "fc2" never match SAM3 3. model_builder.py lines 37-44: _register decorator never used 4. sam3_backbone.py lines 171-178: _auto_input_size() always returns constant 5. run_factorial.sh lines 374-375: FAILED=0/LAUNCHED=0 overwritten before read 6. run_factorial_resilient.sh line 33: MAX_OUTER_RETRIES=2016 never used 7. sam3_hybrid.py: GatedFeatureFusion.forward() dead (T18 refactors this)
FIX: Remove each dead item. For docstrings, update to match reality. For "fc1"/"fc2", remove if confirmed not needed for any supported model. For _auto_input_size(), inline the constant.
NOTE: Only delete what is CLEARLY dead. If in doubt, leave it.

task.name: Fix zero-shot baselines missing retry logic and GRADIENT_CHECKPOINTING
task.description:
BUG: Training conditions get retry + exponential backoff (lines 404-434). Zero-shot baselines use single subprocess.run() with no retry (line 519). Also: zero-shot block omits GRADIENT_CHECKPOINTING env var.
FIX: Add retry loop to zero-shot Python block matching training retries. Add GRADIENT_CHECKPOINTING env var (using model_overrides lookup, default false).
EVIDENCE: run_factorial.sh lines 518-547.

task.name: Fix resilient script permanent failure tracking across log files
task.description:
BUG: Each run_factorial.sh --resume invocation creates a NEW job log file. The resilient wrapper's check_for_permanent_failures reads only the LATEST log, so failure counts never accumulate across iterations. A condition that fails once per iteration never reaches MAX_CONDITION_FAILURES=3.
FIX: grep across ALL log files (not just latest) when counting failures: grep -h "LAUNCH_FAILED" outputs/*factorial_job_ids.txt | ...
Also fix: no deduplication in permanent failure file.
EVIDENCE: run_factorial_resilient.sh line 123.

phase.name: Final Review and Verification
phase.description: After all tasks complete: 1. Run /simplify on all changed files 2. Run make test-staging — MUST be 0 fail, 0 skip 3. Run ruff check + mypy 4. Update this plan with final status 5. Write execution report 6. Create PR → main

task.name: Run /simplify code review on all changed files
task.description:
Review all files modified in phases 1-4 using /simplify skill. Focus on: code quality, reuse opportunities, naming consistency, unnecessary complexity introduced by fixes.
Files to review (all impl_files from T1-T26): - src/minivess/adapters/sam3_topolora.py - src/minivess/adapters/sam3_backbone.py - src/minivess/adapters/sam3_hybrid.py - src/minivess/adapters/sam3_feature_cache.py - src/minivess/adapters/model_builder.py - src/minivess/diagnostics/pre_training_checks.py - src/minivess/orchestration/flows/train_flow.py - deployment/skypilot/train_factorial.yaml - scripts/run_factorial.sh - scripts/run_factorial_resilient.sh

task.name: Final verification gate and PR creation
task.description: 1. make test-staging — MUST be 0 fail, 0 skip, 0 xfail 2. uv run ruff check src/ tests/ — 0 errors 3. uv run mypy src/ — 0 errors (or pre-existing only) 4. Update all task statuses in this XML to COMPLETED 5. Write execution report to: docs/planning/v0-2_archive/original_docs/doughnut-hole-execution-report.md 6. Commit: "fix: doughnut-hole bug fixes + test coverage (#doughnut-hole)" 7. Create PR: fix/doughnut-hole-bugs-and-test-coverage → main
